rationale: Diff contains only execution metadata files (manifest.json and result.json) under .ddx/executions/. No source code, tests, or audit lineage implementation are present to evaluate against any acceptance criterion.

findings.summary: No audit lineage implementation: no code recording preview/approval/rejection/expiry/stale/committed events with actor, agent/tool identity, policy version, approver reason, intent ID, or pre/post images.
No tests demonstrating lineage queries by intent ID or entity ID.
No FEAT-029 redaction applied to audit reads to match entity read redaction.
Diff is limited to ddx execution metadata; the referenced result_rev (4c079be) is not represented as code/test changes in this review.
